case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ELIZABETH HOLLAND

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE'S REPRESENTATIVE WAH MEI LEW. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND, ELIZABETH

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.97 SERVED DEC-03-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND, ELIZABETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLAND, ELIZABETH $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.97, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
